content:
# Pore Volume Barrel Treated

**Summary**: A measure of acidizing efficiency, representing the volume of rock dissolved per barrel of acid injected.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] used PVBT as the primary target variable for AI prediction models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] Primary metric for evaluating the success of a matrix acidizing treatment.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] Calculated from simulation results.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The highest R2 (0.97) and CC (0.99) were achieved by an ANN with two hidden layers for predicting PVBT. ([[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022, p. 98]])
- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] 0.9 to 43.19
